raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is stacked on top of box_1 and its left/right/front faces are accessible with sufficient clearance for both end-effectors to establish opposing side contacts; lifting box_2 vertically will not collide with the table or other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted clear of box_1, leaving the top of box_1 unblocked."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (on the tabletop, to the right of box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held securely; the placement region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is free of obstacles and provides enough area for a 30x30 cm box footprint.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is placed on the tabletop to the right of box_1 and released, creating full access to the top of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The top of box_1 is no longer blocked by box_2; box_1 left/right/front faces are accessible; there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to clamp opposing sides without contacting the table surface.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted clear of the table (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is stacked on top of box_1 and its left/right/front faces are accessible with sufficient clearance for both end-effectors to establish opposing side contacts; lifting box_2 vertically will not collide with the table or other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted clear of box_1, leaving the top of box_1 unblocked.

parsed_json.Target: table (on the tabletop, to the right of box_1)
parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held securely; the placement region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is free of obstacles and provides enough area for a 30x30 cm box footprint.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the tabletop to the right of box_1 and released, creating full access to the top of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The top of box_1 is no longer blocked by box_2; box_1 left/right/front faces are accessible; there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to clamp opposing sides without contacting the table surface.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted clear of the table (picked up).
